import sys

    data = f.read()
n = len(data)
print(f'Length: {n}')

# Count how many 4-byte matches exist within 32-byte windows
total_bytes = 0
matched_bytes = 0
i = 0
while i < n:
    # Find best match
    best_len = 0
    best_off = 0
    max_off = min(i, 32)
    for off in range(1, max_off + 1):
        l = 0
        while l < 4 and i + l < n and data[i - off + l] == data[i + l]:
            l += 1
        if l > best_len:
            best_len = l
            best_off = off
            if l == 4:
                break
    if best_len >= 2:
        matched_bytes += best_len
        i += best_len
    else:
        total_bytes += 1  # Will be a literal
        i += 1
    total_bytes += 1  # Count all
